title: Software Developer
summary: I am a versatile Software Developer focused on building modern web applications that blend strong engineering with intuitive design. I specialize in developing scalable, user-centered digital experiences throughout the entire development lifecycle. I am currently seeking a professional practicum where I can contribute my skills to forward-thinking engineering teams.
bio: I recently completed my IT Software Development program at NBCC, where I developed a solid foundation in designing and implementing complex full-stack applications. My primary focus is on modern web development—building responsive, high-performance interfaces supported by robust, maintainable back-end systems.

I view great software as the intersection of clean, reliable code and thoughtful, user-first design. Whether I’m designing a backend API or refining a user interface, I prioritize user experience, performance, and accessibility to deliver high-quality digital products.

With a background in team leadership and operations, I value clear communication, accountability, and adaptability. I am seeking a professional practicum placement where I can apply my combined strengths in development and design to solve real-world problems within a collaborative, growth-oriented team.
